slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. VERY GENEROUS outer margin on all four sides. Top-right small: 소아과언니 Pretendard SemiBold navy #1A1F36 only, no decoration, no quotes. Top-left small gray: PARENTING NOTE · 014. Large breathing whitespace before headline. Headline COMPACT two lines: 모기 물렸을 때 navy, 긁지 않게 대처하는 법 with 긁지 않게 underlined in teal #2C6E63. Small subtitle gray: 여름철 필수 가이드 · CDC 권장 기준. LARGE minimalist mosquito and child scratching arm line illustration in teal, prominently placed center-right. Generous bottom whitespace. No pixel values as text. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right small: 소아과언니 navy, no quotes. Top-left small teal rounded label: STEP 01. Headline COMPACT: 물린 직후 with 직후 teal #2C6E63 underline. Large clean illustration of hands washing with soap and water, line art teal/navy minimal style, center-left area. Right side: single light gray card #F0F4F8 rounded with GENEROUS padding. Card content: small gray label 즉시 실천, large bold navy 비누와 물로 씻기, medium navy text 모기 물린 부위를 깨끗이 씻어 오염물질을 제거하고 감염을 예방합니다. Bottom thin teal divider line. No pixel text on card. No quotes on card.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right small: 소아과언니 navy, no quotes. Top-left small teal rounded label: STEP 02. Headline COMPACT: 가려움 진정 with 진정 teal #2C6E63 underline. Large illustration of ice pack on arm, line art teal style, upper center. Below: two stacked cards light gray #F0F4F8 rounded with REDUCED text and GENEROUS padding. Top card: snowflake icon top-left + 얼음찜질 bold navy + 10분간 냉찜질로 가려움과 부기 완화 navy. Bottom card: powder icon top-left + 베이킹소다 페이스트 bold navy + 베이킹소다 1스푼 + 물을 섞어 10분간 발라두기 navy. Comfortable vertical spacing between cards. Bottom thin teal divider. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right small: 소아과언니 navy, no quotes. Top-left small teal rounded label: STEP 03. Headline COMPACT: 약 바르기 with 약 teal #2C6E63 underline. Large illustration of cream tube and lotion bottle, line art teal/navy minimal, center-top. Below: two side-by-side cards equal width with GENEROUS padding. Left card light teal #E8F4F2: small gray 처방 불필요 + large bold teal 1% 하이드로코티손 크림 + navy 하루 3회 가려움 완화. Right card light gray #F0F4F8: small gray 진정 효과 + large bold navy 칼라민 로션 + navy 가려움증 완화에 효과적. Bottom coral warning box #C44536 light background: ⚠️ + white text 생후 2세 미만은 사용 전 의사와 상담. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right small: 소아과언니 navy, no quotes. Top-left small coral rounded label: 중요. Headline COMPACT: 절대 긁지 마세요 with 긁지 마세요 coral #C44536 underline. Large illustration of child with short nails and crossed-out scratching gesture, line art coral/navy, center. Below: single wide coral light background card #FFE8E5 with GENEROUS padding. Card content: prohibition icon ⚠️ top-left + 긁으면 악화됩니다 bold coral + navy text 더 많은 히스타민 분비로 가려움 증가, 피부 감염 위험 상승. Bottom light gray card: checkmark icon + 손톱 짧게 자르기 bold navy + 긁지 않도록 예방 navy. Thin coral divider bottom. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right small: 소아과언니 navy, no quotes. Top-left small teal rounded label: STEP 04. Headline COMPACT: 심한 가려움 대처 with 가려움 대처 teal #2C6E63 underline. Large illustration of medicine bottle and droplet, line art teal/navy minimal, upper center. Below: single wide light amber card #FFF3E0 with GENEROUS padding. Card content: pill icon top-left + 경구용 항히스타민제 large bold navy + 1세 이상 복용 가능 navy medium + 베나드릴(디펜히드라민) 권장 navy small. Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right small: 소아과언니 navy, no quotes. Top-left small coral rounded label: 병원 방문. Headline COMPACT: 이럴 땐 with 이럴 땐 coral #C44536 underline. Large illustration of hospital building with emergency cross, line art coral/navy, center-top. Below: two stacked coral light background cards #FFE8E5 with REDUCED text and GENEROUS padding. Top card: alert icon ⚠️ + 감염 의심 bold coral + 24시간 후에도 점점 붉어지고 퍼지는 경우 navy. Bottom card: thermometer icon + 즉시 방문 bold coral + 고열 또는 고름이 나오는 경우 navy. Comfortable vertical spacing. Thin coral divider bottom. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top-right small: 소아과언니 navy, no quotes. Top-left small teal rounded label: 회복 & 예방. Headline COMPACT: 자연 회복 기간 with 회복 기간 teal #2C6E63 underline. Large illustration of calendar with checkmarks and mosquito spray bottle, line art teal/navy, upper area. Below: three compact horizontal cards light gray #F0F4F8 with GENEROUS padding. Card 1: clock icon + 가려움 3-4일 bold navy + 붉은 기 3-4일, 부기 7일 navy. Card 2: spray bottle icon + 예방법 bold navy + 생후 2개월 이상: 10-30% DEET 모기 기피제 navy. Card 3: baby icon + 2개월 미만 bold navy + 긴소매 옷 + 유모차 모기장 사용 navy. Thin teal divider bottom. No pixel text. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF. VERY GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 navy, no quotes. Top-center small gray: SAVE & SHARE. Headline COMPACT: 오늘 확인하고 navy, 저장하세요 with 저장하세요 teal #2C6E63 underline. Source box light gray #F0F4F8 rounded GENEROUS padding, left-aligned. 출처 navy small bold line break · CDC Mosquito Information 2024 line break · Seattle Children's Hospital Mosquito Bite Treatment 2025 line break · Healthline Home Remedies 2024 line break · AAP HealthyChildren.org Insect Repellents 2024. Generous spacing + thin horizontal navy divider. 소아과언니 navy bold large center NO quotes. DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray small. Thin divider. @dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 navy. 소아과수첩 앱 · 야간 달빛병원 바로 찾기 teal. No pixel values. No quotes.

common_style:
# 클린 인포그래픽 톤 — 검증된 prompt 패턴

## 공통 규칙 (전 슬라이드)
- 배경: 흰색 #FFFFFF
- 텍스트: deep navy #1A1F36
- 강조: teal #2C6E63
- 경고: coral #C44536
- 카드 배경: light gray #F0F4F8
- VERY GENEROUS outer margin 모든 슬라이드
- 텍스트 크기 20% 작게 (빽빽함 방지)
- 시그니쳐: 우상단 소아과언니 (따옴표 없이 4글자만)

## COVER 패턴 (slide n:1)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF.
VERY GENEROUS outer margin on all four sides.
Top-right small: '소아과언니' Pretendard SemiBold navy only, no decoration, no quotes.
Top-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · [번호]'.
Large breathing whitespace before headline.
Headline COMPACT two lines: '[첫 줄]' navy, '[둘째 줄]' with '[핵심 단어]' underlined in teal #2C6E63.
Small subtitle gray: '[부제] · AAP 가이드라인 기준'.
LARGE minimalist [토픽 관련] line illustration in teal, prominently placed.
Generous bottom whitespace. No pixel values as text. No quotes on card.

## BODY 데이터 카드 패턴
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF.
GENEROUS outer margin all sides.
Top-right small: '소아과언니' navy, no quotes.
Top-left small gray label: '[섹션명]'.
Headline COMPACT: '[앞부분]' navy, '[핵심 단어]' teal or coral underline.
Stacked/grid cards with REDUCED text (20% smaller) + GENEROUS padding + comfortable spacing.
Each card: age/category icon top-left + tag label + bold number/text + subtitle.
No pixel values as text on card.

## 비교 카드 패턴
Two side-by-side cards equal width.
Left card teal header / Right card navy header.
Body light gray: label small gray + main value teal/navy large bold + interval/unit navy.
Bottom coral warning box: ⚠️ + warning text.

## OUTRO 패턴 (slide n:9)
Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Clean infographic style. White background #FFFFFF.
VERY GENEROUS outer margin.
Top-right: '소아과언니' navy, no quotes.
Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'.
Headline COMPACT: '오늘 확인하고 저장하세요' navy, '저장하세요' teal underline.
Source box light gray #F0F4F8 rounded GENEROUS padding, left-aligned.
출처 (navy small bold)
· [출처 1]
· [출처 2]
· [출처 3]
Generous spacing + thin horizontal divider.
소아과언니 navy bold large center (NO quotes).
DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의 gray small.
Thin divider.
@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드 navy.
소아과수첩 앱 · [CTA] teal.
No pixel values. No quotes.
